title: Rattan Storage Handy Basket Organizer Plastic 3 Size 3 Colours Choice Kitchen Bathroom Toy Cosmetics Decoration (Brown, 10L (288 x 197x 162mm))
features: Multi-Purpose Storage: Ideal for storing makeup, toiletries, kitchen essentials, laundry items, office supplies, and more.
High-Quality & Durable: Made from premium plastic for long-lasting use and sturdiness.
Eco-Friendly & Safe: BPA-free, phthalate-free, and fully recyclable, ensuring safety and environmental friendliness.
Elegant & Versatile Design: Stylish rattan effect design available in neutral colors (White, Brown, Anthracite) to match any decor.
Space-Saving & Stackable: Perfect for both small and large spaces; stackable for easy organization and storage.
Available Sizes: 7L (285 x 195 x 129 mm), 10L (323 x 225 x 152 mm), 19L (380 x 278 x 185 mm) to suit various storage needs.
Perfect for Any Room: Great for bathrooms, kitchens, bedrooms, and offices to keep your space neat and stylish.
description: Rattan Effect Plastic Storage Basket – Stylish & Practical! Looking for a stylish and practical storage solution for your home? This nature-inspired Rattan Effect Plastic Storage Basket is perfect for organizing your bathroom, kitchen, laundry room, or home office! With a beautiful woven design, it adds a touch of elegance while keeping your essentials neatly stored away. 💡 Why You’ll Love It? ✔️ Multi-Purpose Storage – Perfect for makeup, toiletries, kitchen essentials, laundry items, office supplies, and more! ✔️ High-Quality & Durable – Made from premium plastic, designed to last. ✔️ Eco-Friendly & Safe – BPA-free, phthalate-free, and fully recyclable! ✔️ Elegant & Versatile – Available in neutral colors (White, Brown & Anthracite) to blend seamlessly with any interior. ✔️ Space-Saving & Stackable – Ideal for small and large spaces alike! 📏 Available Sizes: 📌 7L – (285 x 195 x 129 mm) 📌 10L – (323 x 225 x 152 mm) 📌 19L – (380 x 278 x 185 mm) ✨ Perfect for bathrooms, kitchens, bedrooms, and offices! Keep your space tidy in style – order yours today!
